title: 삼성전자, 3nm GAA 공정 양산 개시
summary: 삼성전자가 3nm 게이트 올 어라운드(GAA) 공정을 본격적으로 양산에 들어갔습니다.
content: Samsung Electronics has begun mass production of its 3nm Gate-All-Around process. The new technology offers improved performance and power efficiency. Major chip manufacturers have already placed orders. Samsung expects to capture significant market share with this advancement. The 3nm process will enable next-generation mobile devices. AI accelerators are also being produced using this technology. Industry analysts see this as a strategic milestone. Competitors are rushing to develop similar capabilities. The yield rates are reportedly meeting initial targets. Samsung plans to expand 3nm production capacity next year. Global semiconductor demand remains strong.
